content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY , ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET UNIVERSITY) <2 OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. GIETU/Exam/2026/ |3\ Date: - 10/01/2026 NOTICE This is for information of all concerned that, the B.Sc. (Hons.) Agriculture Third semester (AR-24 Batch), results have already been published. The students those who are interested for rechecking of their answer scripts may apply in the prescribed format along with required fee of Rs.500/- (Rupees Five Hundred only) per subject to their concerned Dean of the department on or before 13.01.2026. Application received beyond the due date will not be considered. N.B: Students shall download the application form from the University website. Wf. 0 Controller of Examinations GIET University Memo No: ) 31_(79 Date: 10.01.2026 Copy to: Vice- Chancellor/ Registrar for information. Dean SoAg / B.Sc (Ag) Coordinator/Account Section for information. GIETU Website/Notice Board. MW% GIET University
